instruction: Please put together something the team can use for the community health fair art-therapy station. Save it in /Program Development/Art Therapy Integration, title it "Community Health Fair Art-Therapy Station Setup," and include the supply list, volunteer roles, table layout, and participant check-in steps.

rule_ref.rule_text: When he needs a reusable structure for recurring health-fair or art-therapy planning, he prefers creating a template rather than a one-off note.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Repeatable program work should start from a template, not a scratch note.

attributes.title: Community Health Fair Booth Setup Notes
attributes.content_brief: One-off jot sheet from a recent fair covering easels, markers, folding table placement, and volunteer arrival details.

attributes.title: Art-Therapy Supply Table Reminder
attributes.content_brief: Single-event reminder about paint trays, wipes, name tags, and sign-in sheets for a weekend program.

attributes.title: Wellness Outreach Check-In Notes
attributes.content_brief: Scratch notes on greeting participants and where completed forms were stacked at the last health fair.

attributes.title: Program Activity Planning Grid
attributes.content_brief: Reusable structure for tracking supplies, staff roles, setup layout, and participant flow for program activities.
